fsymId.description: FactSet Security Identifier. Six alpha-numeric characters, excluding vowels, with a -S suffix (XXXXXX-S), resolved from the requestId of the Fund requested.

fundFlows.description: Fund flows data for the specified share class in raw units of the specified currency.

currency.description: The Currency of the AUM values. By default it will be in the FUnds Currency, unless otherwise requested via the currency parameter.

date.description: The date of the AUM in YYYY-MM-DD format.

requestId.description: The requested Id sent as input.
